notes: Full cases generate A_dense.bin, B_dense.bin, C_dense.bin, CSR, and vector-CSR.
A is sparse M x K, B is dense K x N, C is dense M x N.
All cases below are full-generation cases even though names do not add a _full suffix.
Large cases can consume substantial disk space and CPU time because C_dense.bin is generated by A @ B.

cases.name: tfup_m4096_n256_k1024_s85_d16
cases.source_hint: Transformer FFN up projection with smaller activation columns

cases.name: tfup_m4096_n2048_k1024_s90_d16
cases.source_hint: Transformer FFN up projection with large activation columns

cases.name: conv1x1_m512_n3136_k512_s90_d16
cases.source_hint: 1x1 convolution lowered to GEMM, 56x56 spatial columns

cases.name: conv1x1_m1024_n12544_k1024_s90_d16
cases.source_hint: 1x1 convolution lowered to GEMM, 112x112 spatial columns

cases.name: stress_m4096_n1024_k4096_s85_d16
cases.source_hint: 4096 square sparse weight with medium activation columns

cases.name: stress_m8192_n512_k8192_s95_d16
cases.source_hint: Large 8192 square stress case with high sparsity
